title: Add Edit Profile functionality to Driver Dashboard

requirements.text: Add an 'Edit Profile' button to the Driver Dashboard page that opens an editable form modal or section for driver profile fields

quotes: On Driver Dashboard add an "Edit Profile" button.

acceptanceCriteria: Edit Profile button is visible on Driver Dashboard page
Button opens an editable form when clicked
Form displays all required driver profile fields

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with servicePincode field (required, text input with validation)
acceptanceCriteria: servicePincode field is rendered as text input
Field is marked as required
Form validation prevents submission if servicePincode is empty

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with serviceAreaName field (required, text input with validation)
acceptanceCriteria: serviceAreaName field is rendered as text input
Field is marked as required
Form validation prevents submission if serviceAreaName is empty

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with vehicleExperience field as multi-select checkboxes with options: Hatchback, Sedan, SUV, Luxury
acceptanceCriteria: vehicleExperience field displays as multiple checkboxes
Checkboxes include options: Hatchback, Sedan, SUV, Luxury
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
Selected values are stored as an array

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with transmissionComfort field as multi-select checkboxes with options: Manual, Automatic, EV
acceptanceCriteria: transmissionComfort field displays as multiple checkboxes
Checkboxes include options: Manual, Automatic, EV
Multiple checkboxes can be selected simultaneously
Selected values are stored as an array

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with languages field (optional, text input or multi-select implementation)
acceptanceCriteria: languages field is rendered (text input or multi-select)
Field is optional and does not prevent form submission when empty
Input value is stored as array or comma-separated list

requirements.text: Create editable profile form with isAvailable field as a toggle switch
acceptanceCriteria: isAvailable field displays as a toggle switch
Toggle can be switched between on/off states
Toggle state is stored as boolean value

requirements.text: Implement Save button in the profile edit form that calls the existing saveCallerUserProfile backend function with all form field values

quotes: persist to backend using existing saveCallerUserProfile (or the same profile save function already used in app)

acceptanceCriteria: Save button is rendered in the edit form
Clicking Save calls saveCallerUserProfile with form data
Form data includes all fields: servicePincode, serviceAreaName, vehicleExperience array, transmissionComfort array, languages, isAvailable boolean
Loading state is shown during save operation

requirements.text: After successful save, immediately update the My Profile display card on Driver Dashboard to reflect the newly saved values without requiring page refresh

quotes: update the My Profile card immediately

acceptanceCriteria: After save completes successfully, My Profile section updates automatically
Updated values are visible in the My Profile display card
No page refresh is required to see changes
Edit form closes after successful save

requirements.text: Ensure driver profile data persists across page refresh and logout/login cycles by verifying backend storage

quotes: data must persist after refresh + logout/login

acceptanceCriteria: After saving profile and refreshing the page, saved values are still displayed in My Profile section
After saving profile, logging out, and logging back in, saved values are still displayed
Backend correctly stores and retrieves all driver profile field values

constraints: Do NOT modify trip logic or trip-related backend functions
Do NOT modify customer pages or customer-facing components
Use the existing saveCallerUserProfile backend function for persistence
Only modify Driver Dashboard and driver profile-related components
nonGoals: Changes to trip creation, acceptance, or completion logic
Changes to customer booking form or customer dashboard
Changes to admin dashboard or admin functionality
Adding new backend functions beyond existing saveCallerUserProfile
